summary: REQ-29 is fully implemented. A new utility file frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts was added that builds the WhatsApp deep-link URL (https://wa.me/919137202881?text=...) and opens it in a new browser tab. The Cart.tsx file was modified to import sendWhatsAppNotification and call it inside the onSuccess callback of the placeOrderMutation, after which the cart is cleared and navigation to the order confirmation page proceeds. All required message fields (Order ID, buyer name, country, phone, address, items with product name and quantity, order total in Euro, and timestamp) are included. The notification does not block the existing redirect flow.
